evals.name: batch-esm2stabp
evals.prompt: create a protocol that takes a list of protein sequences and runs ESM2StabP stability prediction on all of them in batches of 8, ranking by melting temperature descending. user should be able to toggle deduplication.
evals.expected_output: A valid YAML file saved to ~/Developer/protocols/single_model/ following naming convention, with gather+foreach batch pattern, correct response_mapping for ESM2StabP, and deduplication toggle.

evals.name: boltz2-cofold
evals.prompt: write a protocol that co-folds two protein sequences using boltz2. user provides chain A and chain B as separate inputs. rank by confidence_score.
evals.expected_output: A valid YAML file using the molecules format for Boltz2 with two separate text inputs (H/A and B chains), correct molecules list in request_body, response_mapping for confidence_score, saved to single_model/.

evals.name: progen2-antibody-generation
evals.prompt: make a protocol for generating antibody sequences with progen2-oas. the user should control number of sequences (up to 500), temperature, and max_length. rank by lowest perplexity.
evals.expected_output: A valid YAML using progen2-oas slug, subtasks fan-out pattern with correct subtask.index split_params, generation response_mapping using results[0][*], perplexity ranked ascending, user-controllable num_samples/temperature/max_length inputs.
